summaries.title: Sprint 3+4 — Multi-Provider Sandbox, Prompt Customization, Reasoning Config, TypeScript Ports, and Sprint 4 Features (F7-F10)
summaries.summary: This lesson covers the implementation of Sprint 3 and 4 features, including a multi-provider sandbox system (E2B and Daytona), a prompt customization system with four variants and slash commands, and a reasoning configuration layer supporting multiple AI providers. Additional features include TypeScript ports for core loops, an auth system abstraction, a browser automation agent, an artifact storage system, and deployer adapters for Vercel, Cloudflare, and Netlify. The key takeaway is the creation of a modular, provider-agnostic architecture that abstracts sandbox, auth, storage, and deployment functionalities for flexible integration.
